title: AI search chat — panel UX, geo "nearby destinations", attractions & conversational intent

tasks.title: Unify the two panel headers into a single header (G-3)
tasks.description: Merge the dialog title "Búsqueda inteligente" and the region heading "Búsqueda conversacional" into one header row in SearchChatPanel.client.tsx / AiSearchEntry.client.tsx, preserving a11y labels (aria-label on dialog, heading for the region). Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/SearchChatPanel.client.tsx, AiSearchEntry.client.tsx, SearchChatPanel.module.css. Tests: component test asserting a single heading element and that the accessible name is preserved.

subtasks.title: Collapse dialog title + region heading into one header row
Preserve aria-label / accessible name
Component test for single header + a11y name

tasks.title: Compact ResultCard with overlaid star + type badges (G-1)
tasks.description: Redesign the result card to a compact layout: photo with overlaid badges (single star rating + accommodation type), reduced vertical height. Web is vanilla CSS/CSS Modules. Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/ (ResultCard within SearchChatPanel), SearchChatPanel.module.css. Tests: component test asserting star + type render as badges over the photo and reduced card height class applied.

subtasks.title: Overlay star + type badges on the photo
Reduce card vertical footprint
Component test for badges + compact layout

tasks.title: Results area subtle background to separate it from the chat thread (G-2)
tasks.description: Give the results container a subtle themed background using existing surface/overlay design tokens so it reads as distinct from the conversation thread. Also ensures the empty-state and the results grid look visually distinct (supports G-8). Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/SearchChatPanel.module.css. Tests: visual/snapshot or class-presence assertion.

subtasks.title: Apply surface token background to results container
Ensure empty-state visually distinct from grid

tasks.title: Make the found-results count prominent (G-4)
tasks.description: Render the results count with a prominent treatment near the results area header. Use inline t(key, fallback) i18n pattern (aiSearch.* namespace has no entries). Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/SearchChatPanel.client.tsx, SearchChatPanel.module.css. Tests: component test asserting the count is rendered and updates with resultsCount.

subtasks.title: Prominent count treatment
Component test for count render/update

tasks.title: Maximize toggle: widen drawer to ~60% viewport, reversible (G-5, OQ-1)
tasks.description: Add a maximize control that widens the chat drawer to ~60% of the viewport (NOT full-screen modal), keeping the page visible behind it, reversible. Enough room for 2-3 card columns. Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/AiSearchEntry.client.tsx (drawer wrapper), SearchChatPanel.module.css. Tests: component test toggling maximize state and asserting the width class flips both ways.

subtasks.title: Maximize/restore toggle control
~60% viewport width class, page visible behind
Component test for reversible toggle

tasks.title: Compact filter chips reflecting APPLIED params, not raw intent (G-6, AC-6)
tasks.description: Restyle filter chips to a compact form (consider a "N filtros" collapse when many) AND switch the chip source from the raw LLM intent to the applied params, so a filter that isn't actually sent (e.g. a maxGuests chip) never renders. Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/SearchChatPanel.client.tsx, useSearchChat.ts, SearchChatPanel.module.css. Tests: component test asserting chips derive from applied params and that a dropped intent field produces no chip.

subtasks.title: Compact chip styling + optional N-filtros collapse
Derive chips from applied params, not raw intent
Test: dropped intent field renders no chip

tasks.title: State-aware input placeholder (G-7, OQ-5)
tasks.description: Make the input placeholder change across states with the agreed Rioplatense copy: initial="Contame qué buscás, por ejemplo: cabaña para 4 con pileta cerca del río"; has-results="Afiná tu búsqueda: sumá precio, características, o pedí destinos cercanos"; no-results="No encontré nada con esos filtros. Probá quitando alguno o buscá en destinos cercanos." Keep inline t(key, fallback). Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/SearchChatPanel.client.tsx, useSearchChat.ts. Tests: component test asserting placeholder text per state (initial/has-results/no-results).

subtasks.title: Derive placeholder from search state
Wire the three copy variants
Test placeholder across the three states

tasks.title: Reproduce & resolve "cards drop from 2 columns to 1 on re-search" (G-8, AC-8)
tasks.description:
Reproduce Bug #8. Preliminary diagnosis: NOT a CSS regression (.resultsGrid byte-identical) — likely the empty-state (.resultsEmpty, full-width

) appearing when a refinement returns 0 results, reading as "1 full-width column". Confirm with resultsCount in repro. If count > 1 and still 1 column, the cause is an ancestor layout container. Either fix or document as empty-state behavior with the agreed UX (pairs with T-003). Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/SearchChatPanel.module.css / .client.tsx. Tests: regression test for a 0-result refinement not collapsing the grid and >1 result rendering multi-column.

subtasks.title: Reproduce with resultsCount instrumentation
Fix or document empty-state vs grid distinction
Regression test multi-column with >1 result

tasks.title: Verify & extend NL amenities/features resolution (G-10, AC-10)
tasks.description: Confirm the intent allowlist + extraction prompt map natural language to the REAL slugs and add any missing mappings: pets (pet_friendly amenity / pet_friendly_area, pet_suitable features), smoking INVERSE ("se pueda fumar"→smoking_area feature; "libre de humo"→smoke_free amenity), A/C (air_conditioning amenity), river/beach-front via existing features (Frente al río / Frente al balneario). Files: apps/api search-chat intent prompt/allowlist + packages/schemas ai-search-intent schema if needed. Tests: unit tests asserting each NL phrase resolves to the expected slug(s).

subtasks.title: Audit allowlist + prompt vs real slugs
Add smoking inverse + river/beach feature mappings
Unit tests per NL phrase → slug

tasks.title: Extract shared Haversine helper from accommodation.model.ts (G-9 foundation)
tasks.description: Extract buildHaversineDistanceExpr({latCol, longCol, lat, long}) and a withinRadius variant from the private buildGeoRadiusClause / buildDistanceOrderExpr in accommodation.model.ts into a reusable place in packages/db, so destination↔destination and destination↔accommodation distance share one formula (Earth radius 6371 km). Guard coordinates IS NOT NULL and cast the string {lat, long} (key is long, not lng) to numeric. This helper is also the HOS-113/POI dependency. Files: packages/db (new helper module) + accommodation.model.ts refactor to use it. Tests: unit tests for the distance expr / withinRadius against known coordinate pairs.

subtasks.title: Extract shared distance + withinRadius helper
Refactor accommodation.model.ts to use it (no dup formula)
Unit tests against known coordinate pairs

tasks.title: Nearby-destination resolution: ~50km radius + fallback to N nearest (G-9, OQ-2)
tasks.description: Add a resolver that, given an anchor destinationId, finds destinations with coordinates within a fixed radius (~50 km, tunable via a constant, no UI), guarded by coordinates IS NOT NULL, with a FALLBACK to the N nearest destinations when the radius is empty so a follow-up never comes back empty. Uses the T-010 helper. Files: packages/db destination model + packages/service-core destination service. Tests: unit tests for radius hit, empty-radius fallback, and null-coordinate exclusion.

subtasks.title: Radius query using shared helper + NOT NULL guard
Fallback to N nearest when radius empty
Unit tests: hit / fallback / null-coord exclusion

tasks.title: Intent slot + prompt for nearby expansion (G-9)
tasks.description: Add an optional intent slot (e.g. expandToNearby: boolean or nearbyOfDestinationId) to the ai-search-intent schema and reinforce the extraction prompt so conversational follow-ups ("y en destinos cercanos", "también cerca") produce that signal, leveraging the message history the endpoint already sends. Files: packages/schemas ai-search-intent.schema.ts + apps/api search-chat prompt. Tests: unit tests asserting follow-up phrases set the nearby signal and that unrelated messages don't.

subtasks.title: Add optional nearby slot to intent schema
Reinforce prompt to detect nearby follow-ups from history
Unit tests: follow-up sets signal, unrelated doesn't

tasks.title: Wire nearby expansion into search-chat handler + emit resolved destinations in SSE (G-9, AC-9)
tasks.description: In the search-chat handler, when the nearby signal is present, resolve the anchor destination's neighbors (T-011) and turn it into a multi-destination / geo-radius accommodation search; emit the resolved destination set in the filters SSE frame so the UI can show which destinations were included. Files: apps/api search-chat.ts handler. Tests: integration test for "cabaña en Colón, y también en destinos cercanos" returning Colón + ~50km neighbors and the filters frame listing them.

subtasks.title: Resolve neighbors on nearby signal and expand search
Emit resolved destinations in filters SSE frame
Integration test for Colón + nearby

tasks.title: UI: show which nearby destinations were included (G-9, AC-9)
tasks.description: Render the resolved nearby-destination set from the filters SSE frame in the panel (chips or a line like "incluyendo Pueblo Liebig, San José, C. del Uruguay") so it's clear which destinations were searched. Files: apps/web/src/components/ai-search/SearchChatPanel.client.tsx, useSearchChat.ts. Tests: component test asserting the included destinations render when the frame carries them.

subtasks.title: Read resolved destinations from filters frame
Render included-destinations indicator
Component test for included destinations

tasks.title: attractionSlugs intent slot + curated attraction allowlist in prompt (G-11)
tasks.description: Add an optional attractionSlugs slot to the ai-search-intent schema (mirroring amenitySlugs/featureSlugs) and inject a curated attraction allowlist into the extraction prompt so the model emits canonical attraction slugs (e.g. "carnavales"). Files: packages/schemas ai-search-intent.schema.ts + apps/api search-chat prompt. Tests: unit tests asserting NL attraction mentions resolve to canonical slugs and off-allowlist terms don't hallucinate.

subtasks.title: Add attractionSlugs slot to intent schema
Inject curated attraction allowlist into prompt
Unit tests: NL → canonical slug, no hallucination

tasks.title: Attraction → destinations → constrain accommodation search (G-11, AC-11)
tasks.description: Resolve emitted attraction slug(s) to attraction rows, find destinations that have them via r_destination_attraction, and constrain the accommodation search to those destinations (no accommodation↔attraction join for the MVP). Files: apps/api search-chat handler + packages/service-core / packages/db attraction+destination resolution. Tests: integration test for "una ciudad con carnavales" constraining results to destinations with that attraction.

subtasks.title: Resolve attraction slug → destinations via r_destination_attraction
Constrain accommodation search to those destinations
Integration test for carnavales query

tasks.title: Support multi-destinationId filter in accommodation query schema (G-11)
tasks.description: If the accommodation query schema does not already accept multiple destinationIds, add a multi-destinationId filter (used by attraction resolution T-016, and optionally by nearby expansion T-013). Files: packages/schemas accommodation.query.schema.ts + packages/db accommodation.model.ts query builder. Tests: unit tests asserting the query returns accommodations across multiple destinationIds.

subtasks.title: Add multi-destinationId filter to query schema
Implement in query builder
Unit test multi-destination results

tasks.title: Cross-cutting integration/E2E tests for geo + attraction flows (AC-12)
tasks.description: Add end-to-end/integration coverage for the conversational geo-nearby flow and the attraction-constrained flow through the search-chat endpoint, plus regression guards. Files: apps/api search-chat test suite. Tests: E2E asserting AC-9 (Colón + nearby) and AC-11 (carnavales) behave end-to-end; typecheck/lint/tests green.

subtasks.title: E2E for geo-nearby flow (AC-9)
E2E for attraction-constrained flow (AC-11)
Regression guards + green gate

tasks.title: Close-out notes + doc touch-ups

Update any web/ai-search component doc if present. Files: .specs/HOS-111-ai-search-panel-ux-geo/closeout.md.
